overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showcasing Night City at night. The clip transitions from an elevated plaza view to a moving perspective along a busy elevated walkway overlooking traffic, ending in an intimate bar interior with Japanese-inspired neon decor.

segments.scene_description: Elevated view of a cyberpunk plaza at night, featuring a metal grate walkway in the foreground and a lone character standing in the center of the wet, reflective intersection. Neon signs and towering skyscrapers frame the scene.

segments.scene_description: Moving along an elevated walkway overlooking a busy cyberpunk avenue lined with palm trees. The camera passes by illuminated advertising panels while observing moderate traffic including a futuristic bus and purple truck, with pedestrians walking along the sidewalks below.

segments.scene_description: Interior of a stylish cyberpunk bar featuring large Japanese paper lanterns with pixel art designs glowing in purple and white neon. The bartender works behind a luminous counter while the city lights are visible through the window in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a wide, elevated view of a rainy cyberpunk plaza into the intimate, neon-lit interior of a stylish bar. It begins overlooking a wet, reflective intersection where a lone character stands amidst towering skyscrapers and glowing signs. As the camera glides forward, the perspective shifts to an elevated walkway, passing illuminated advertising panels and palm trees while observing futuristic buses and trucks navigating the busy avenue below. The scene then moves seamlessly from the open city air into a sheltered indoor space, where the urban noise fades into the glow of large Japanese paper lanterns featuring purple and white pixel art. Finally, the view settles on a luminous bar counter where a bartender works against a backdrop of distant city lights shimmering through the window.
